name: peachcard
description: Create and review spaced-repetition flashcards with PeachCard (FSRS scheduling). Bundles the MCP server registration and a card-design skill so Codex writes good cards by default.

interface.shortDescription: Create and review FSRS flashcards from Codex.
interface.longDescription: PeachCard is an Anki-like spaced-repetition flashcard app using FSRS scheduling. This plugin registers the PeachCard MCP server and adds a card-design skill so Codex creates short, atomic, reviewable cards by default.
defaultPrompt: Add PeachCard flashcards about this topic.
Show me which PeachCard cards are due.
Create a PeachCard deck with atomic cards.
